name: What if symptoms from work injury show up weeks later in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms from work injury show up weeks later in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report when noticed if within 60 days; get medical link.[3][10]
acceptedAnswer.description: Still compensable if linked to work event; report when noticed, within 60 days max.[3][10] Delayed symptoms common in repetitive or latent injuries.[1] Key factors: Medical opinion on causation; timely overall reporting; document progression.[4] Practical guidance: See doctor promptly, explain work connection, and notify employer even late. Attorney proves nexus for approval.

description: Report when noticed if within 60 days; get medical link.[3][10]
